files.patch:
@@ -24,1 +24,1 @@
-# Bash completion for jcmd.
+# Bash completion for jcmd tool.
@@ -50,1 +50,1 @@
-function _jcmd__list_commands_for_pid() {
+function _jcmd__list_commands_for_jvm() {
@@ -64,1 +64,1 @@
-  # include generic options a well
+  # include generic options as well
@@ -67,2 +67,2 @@
-  local pid main_class rest
-  while read -r pid main_class rest; do
+  local pid main_class _rest
+  while read -r pid main_class _rest; do
@@ -81,1 +81,1 @@
-  # include reading commands from file flag
+  # include "read commands from file" -f flag
@@ -88,1 +88,1 @@
-  done < <(_jcmd__list_commands_for_pid "${jvm_identifier}")
+  done < <(_jcmd__list_commands_for_jvm "${jvm_identifier}")
@@ -105,1 +105,1 @@
-  done < <(_jcmd__list_commands_for_pid "${jvm_identifier}")
+  done < <(_jcmd__list_commands_for_jvm "${jvm_identifier}")
@@ -115,1 +115,1 @@
-  # latest argument, potentially incomplete
+  # current word, possibly incomplete
@@ -155,1 +155,2 @@
-
+# Avoid alphabetical sorting of completion candidates on double-TAB. This
+# keeps each JVM identifier (main class or JAR path) next to its PID.
